# Owner Housing

> Owner Housing is a property listing platform for India where buyers and renters can find verified properties directly from owners — no brokers, no commission. Browse apartments, houses, villas, plots, PG accommodations, and commercial spaces across Guwahati, and more.

## About

Owner Housing connects property seekers directly with property owners across Assam. All listings are verified and posted by owners themselves. The platform covers both residential and commercial properties for sale and rent, with prices in Indian Rupees (INR) formatted in lakhs and crores.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ownerhousing.in/): Browse all property listings with filters for buy/rent, price range, and sorting options
- [3 BHK Apartment in Six Mile, Guwahati](https://ownerhousing.in/listing/3bhk-apartment-buy-sixmile-guwahati): ₹75 L, 1350 sqft, For Sale
- [Multiple Properties in Six Mile — Rent, PG & Sale](https://ownerhousing.in/listing/multi-property-sixmile-guwahati-rent-pg-sale): ₹7,500/mo, 3500 sqft, For Rent
- [Commercial Shop Space in Six Mile, Guwahati](https://ownerhousing.in/listing/commercial-shop-rent-sixmile-guwahati): ₹25,000/mo, 450 sqft, For Rent

## Property Types Available

- Apartments (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK)
- Shops / Retail Spaces

## Cities Covered

Guwahati

## Contact

All property owners can be contacted directly via phone or WhatsApp. No broker involvement, no commission charged.

## Full Content

For complete listing data, see [llms-full.txt](https://ownerhousing.in/llms-full.txt)
